approvalSource: Steve approved unattended overnight Foundation audit-control sprint and required deep-audit findings to become fixes, live cards, gates, or proof instead of report noise.
constraints: do not redesign Recent Work or Daily Summary
do not rewrite build-log closeout history or remove top-level builds compatibility
cache/slim proof must dogfood the old duplicated payload and no-cache failure modes
green means raw green; repeated failures repair first
each card must close with focused proof, System Health, repeated-failure gate, backlog hygiene, foundation:verify, process:foundation-ship, and clean pushed main
